items.text: Similarly, to the extent any of the foregoing adversely affects the Company’s customers and suppliers, it may also adversely affect the Company’s financial results.
items.rationale: Generic statement that adverse effects on customers/suppliers could ripple to the company's financials; no new specific risk introduced.

items.text: In addition, the increasing use and development of AI has increased demand for AI-related projects, including data center power solutions and semiconductor applications.
items.rationale: Introduces a specific new market driver (AI-related demand for data center power and semiconductor applications) not previously disclosed.

items.text: The growth and development of this rapidly-evolving industry is difficult to predict.
items.rationale: Generic cautionary language about industry unpredictability with no specific detail.

items.text: Changes in demand can affect the timing and amounts of customer investments in our products, which could materially affect the Company and its financial condition and results of operations.
items.rationale: Elaborates on how demand changes affect timing/amount of customer investments and financial results, expanding on existing demand risk.

items.text: The Company is exposed to fluctuations in foreign currency exchange rates arising from its global business operations.
items.rationale: Generic statement introducing FX exposure topic, standard boilerplate framing for currency risk section.

items.text: Approximately 34% of net sales in 2025 were recorded by subsidiaries with functional currencies other than the U.S.
items.rationale: Adds specific quantification (34% of net sales) to the existing foreign currency exposure risk, making it more concrete.

items.text: Results of these subsidiaries are translated into U.S.
items.rationale: Factual, mechanical description of translation accounting process, not a risk statement itself.

items.text: Dollars for reporting purposes and the strengthening of the U.S.
items.rationale: Continuation of the translation process description, part of standard disclosure language.

items.text: Dollar could result in unfavorable translation effects.
items.rationale: Specifies the consequence (unfavorable translation effects from USD strengthening) of the existing FX risk, adding detail.

items.text: In addition, certain of the Company’s businesses transact in a currency other than the business’s functional currency, and movements in the transaction currency as related to the functional currency could also result in unfavorable transactional exchange rate effects.
items.rationale: Adds a new dimension (transactional currency mismatch) to the existing foreign currency risk disclosure, expanding its scope.
